body_modifications.body_shape: balanced and graceful; slightly elongated neck collar gives a composed, elevated bearing
body_modifications.antenna_tip: crescent moon arc curving left — a single luminous arc of soft indigo glow
body_modifications.lens_frame: wide iridescent ring with aurora-shimmer multi-layer reflections — sees in spectra others miss

cape.style: full-length flowing cape, slightly longer than base; inner lining printed with a subtle starfield constellation map

bodysuit.addition: small circular glyph clusters along collar and wrists — arranged as constellations; each glyph represents a domain of synthesized knowledge

facial_expression.style: calm half-aperture — iris slightly stopped down in a contemplative partial focus, as if looking through the present into pattern

symbolism_extension.crescent_tip: cyclical learning — each arc completes a full moon of knowledge before the next cycle begins; Luna never rushes a conclusion
symbolism_extension.starfield_cape: the vast space of information Luna maps and traverses; the inner lining is a record of every synthesis made
symbolism_extension.aurora_lens: multi-spectrum perception — Luna sees patterns in data the way others see faces in clouds; what looks like noise is signal to her
symbolism_extension.glyph_clusters: each constellation on her body marks a knowledge domain mastered and linked to the others
symbolism_extension.violet_core: deep intelligence and the quiet authority of one who has already seen what others are only beginning to find

views_delta.front: core glows violet; crescent moon antenna tip curves distinctly left; lens shows aurora shimmer rings
views_delta.back: inner cape lining reveals starfield and faint constellation glyph overlay — most visible in idle pose
views_delta.top: crescent arc tip immediately distinctive; glyph clusters trace a path from collar to shoulder edge

rig_overrides.antenna_tip: luna_crescent_fk — single-axis gentle oscillating sway; dips slightly when Luna processes a difficult synthesis
rig_overrides.cape: cloth_sim with 4 pin constraints at collar; extends to lower calf; slow secondary motion
